# GEMINI.md

> Charter Kit development context router

## TASK

Charter Kit development rules

## CONTEXT

- PNPM monorepo with project references
- Package flow: types <- git, classify, validate, drift, blast, surface, ci <- cli
- blast and surface are zero-dependency analysis packages (no @stackbilt/types)
- ADF package is zero-dependency and self-contained
- Repo uses SemVer for published packages and machine-facing governance contracts
- Conventional Commits: feat(scope):, fix(scope):, docs:, chore:
- .charter/ holds governance config: config.json, patterns/*.json, policies/*.md
- CLI command handlers in packages/cli/src/commands/, config in src/config.ts

## CONSTRAINTS _(load-bearing)_

- TypeScript strict mode, ES2022 target, CommonJS output
- 2-space indent, semicolons, single quotes, kebab-case filenames
- Pure functions in library packages; side effects only in CLI command handlers
- Import across packages via @stackbilt/* aliases (tsconfig.base.json)
- All commands must support --format json for stable machine-readable output
- Exit codes: 0 success, 1 policy violation, 2 runtime/usage error
- Treat JSON schemas, exit-code meanings, and generated artifact conventions as semver-governed contracts
- Breaking contract changes require explicit semver classification and migration notes in roadmap/release docs
- Commits via scripts/smart-commit.sh only (never raw git add/commit)
- Run scripts/smart-commit.sh --dry-run first to preview grouped commits
- Validation gates: pnpm run typecheck, pnpm run build, pnpm run test
- Use pnpm exec tsc instead of npx tsc in WSL
- Bias toward action over clarification; implement rather than ask when task is clear

## Additional instructions

Read the matching file before working in these areas:

- `.ai/adf-dev.adf` — Triggers: ADF, parser, formatter, patcher, bundler, metric, weight
- `.ai/governance.adf` — Triggers: validate, drift, audit, trailer, risk, governance
- `.ai/classifier.adf` — Triggers: classifier, routing, auto-route, adf add, classify, rule placement
- `.ai/analysis.adf` — Triggers: blast, surface, dependency graph, blast radius, route extraction, schema extraction
- `.ai/typed-data-access.adf` — Triggers: tenant, user, subscription, quota, credit, mrr, pii, sensitivity, data registry, ontology, disambiguation, DATA_AUTHORITY, raw D1, service boundary, auth_scoped, billing_critical
